productDisplayName: Hanes Men Sleeveless V Neck White Grey Innerwear T-shirt
description: Composition White and grey sleeveless T-shirt made of ComfortSoft 100% combed cotton, has a lay flat V-neck collar, with ribbed armholes and collar in white and collection label in distressed print on the back chest Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Lightweight with a V-neck, this hanes T-shirt is created using superior ComfortSoft cotton that lets the fabric contour to your body fit and allows you to stretch in ease. The V-shaped lay flat collar not only oozes sporty vibe, but also retains its shape wash after wash. And what's even better is that this T-shirt comes with a printed brand label on the inner neck - so bid goodbye to those scratchy labels and welcome comfort at its best! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
